title: MapReduce Delegation Token Management
description: The 'security/token/delegation' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture is dedicated to managing delegation tokens for secure job submission and tracking. The core components include 'DelegationTokenIdentifier.java', which creates and manages MapReduce-specific tokens, 'DelegationTokenSecretManager.java', responsible for the lifecycle of these tokens, and 'DelegationTokenSelector.java', which identifies MapReduce tokens. These elements collaborate to ensure secure access and job management in Hadoop MapReduce, adhering to the Delegate pattern for secure token handling. The system relies on Hadoop's security packages and classification annotations for stability and audience specification.

TITLE: MapReduce Delegation Token Management

DESCRIPTION:
The 'security/token/delegation' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture is dedicated to managing delegation tokens for secure job submission and tracking. The core components include 'DelegationTokenIdentifier.java', which creates and manages MapReduce-specific tokens, 'DelegationTokenSecretManager.java', responsible for the lifecycle of these tokens, and 'DelegationTokenSelector.java', which identifies MapReduce tokens. These elements collaborate to ensure secure access and job management in Hadoop MapReduce, adhering to the Delegate pattern for secure token handling. The system relies on Hadoop's security packages and classification annotations for stability and audience specification.
